loop1.title: Voltage Live Health
loop1.note: Showing live phase voltages and deviation; Rate Change is omitted as it requires time-series data not available in this snapshot view.

loop1.title: Voltage History
loop1.note: Showing per-phase voltage history and deviation stats. Expected range lines are fixed proxies (230V ±5%) as the asset's nameplate rating is unknown.

loop1.title: Current History
loop1.note: Showing per-phase current history and peak/average stats; expected range lines omitted because the asset's rated current is unknown.
